content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the iterative_minimal workflow preset end-to-end (excluding .ralph-burning/ orchestration state). FlowPreset::IterativeMinimal variant with Display/FromStr, flow definition reusing the two-stage PlanAndImplement+FinalReview shape, workspace/project config keys with cross-scope validation (rejecting zero and stable_rounds_required > max_rounds), journal events (ImplementerIterationStarted/Completed/LoopExited), the iterative loop with stable-count and max-rounds exit in execute_iterative_plan_and_implement_stage, git-based diff fingerprint via git_diff_fingerprint using :(top,exclude).ralph-burning pathspecs covering staged/unstaged/untracked content plus HEAD ref/modes/empty dirs, terminal resume recovery (recover_iterative_iteration_result) with parsed-payload sidecar primary path and raw-output fallback across Claude/Codex/OpenRouter backends, IterativeImplementerState persistence and reconstruction from events, retry preservation of loop budget and stability state, amendment-driven completion_round advance correctly clearing iterative state via carry_forward_iterative_state/iterative_state_carries_into_cursor, and CLI status/tail integration are all implemented correctly. cargo test --all-targets passes (2183 tests, 1 ignored, 0 failures) including 12+ dedicated iterative_minimal tests; cargo fmt --check passes; nix build succeeds. cargo clippy -- -D warnings reports 24 errors, but those same errors also fail on master in the same files at the same locations — they are pre-existing and not introduced by this bead. Per reviewer contract: ignore style and cosmetics, only report real bugs, safety problems, correctness gaps, and significant maintainability risks. None found.

## Amendments

None.
